[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A dark graphic image shows a menacing, snarling mouth with rows of teeth, above which white text reads “AYO MABAR” with a small circular symbol at the end.

The main visual focus is a large, shadowy face area centered in the frame, with the mouth open and teeth visible in a jagged, teeth-filled grin. The background is predominantly black, with faint, darker shapes suggesting the upper portion of a head and surrounding darkness. Lighting is minimal, creating a high-contrast look where the teeth stand out most clearly.

No important visible text detected.

The image appears to be a stylized, dark-themed graphic centered on a snarling mouth with visible teeth. It includes bold white headline text at the top reading “AYO MABAR” followed by a small circular symbol.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
